title: AstralAzeta's Bedrock Armor
description: This mod adds an absolutely broken bedrock armor.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2e9d645f97cd26994810127bb21b372cd8e1a69.png) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/hFS6faY9tW) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralazetas-bedrock-armor)
This mod adds the absolutely broken and non-vanilla bedrock armor, but if you want to craft it, you have to find a way to get bedrock (using glitches or creative mode). It makes the wearer nearly immortal giving every buff in the game and a lot of armor, knockback resistance and armor toughness.
Recipes ![Bedrock Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee8bde14b4f85ba2dbbca271217ef2525b595d2a.png) ![Bedrock Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec0ab79fb0a494cfcd0c769d9bd489c63f7a2d9c.png) ![Bedrock Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a9a0f3cd83f9f5357e3d8339e933b863a0e18c.png) ![Bedrock Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96cdcfb62b6d8cc097027ce6bdfcc78a84a02464.png)
Created using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).
